overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring the Hiyoshi Springs hot spring area during a hazy, warm sunset. The character walks through bamboo forests, crosses wooden bridges over steaming pools, and explores traditional Japanese architecture surrounded by mist and golden light.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo forest path approaching hot spring entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path through dense bamboo forest toward a wooden gate structure

entered.detail: tall bamboo stalks creating dense forest walls on both sides of the path
winding dirt trail with long shadows cast by the setting sun
traditional wooden fence marking the entrance to the springs area
small wooden structure with dark roof visible through the bamboo

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense bamboo forest along a winding dirt path. Long shadows stretch across the ground from the setting sun filtering through the bamboo stalks. A traditional wooden building and fence appear ahead as the path leads toward the hot spring entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air hot spring pool area with rising steam

events.description: text 'HIYOSHI SPRINGS' appears on screen as the character emerges from bamboo forest into the open hot spring area
character steps onto wooden bridge crossing over the steaming hot spring pool

agents.ego_description: walking across wooden bridges and platforms surrounding the steaming hot spring pools

entered.detail: milky blue hot spring water with steam rising from the surface
thick steam rising from the hot water creating atmospheric haze
elevated wooden footbridge crossing over the hot spring water
large rock formations and cliffs surrounding the spring area
traditional stone lantern standing in the water near the pool edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the Hiyoshi Springs area with steaming hot spring pools surrounded by rocky cliffs. The character crosses wooden bridges over the milky water as steam rises around the path. Stone lanterns dot the landscape and the orange sunset glows through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway along hot spring pools

events.description: character walks under a covered wooden gazebo structure with hanging vines

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden walkways passing under covered structures and red paper lanterns

entered.detail: wooden roofed structure with open sides providing partial cover over the walkway
large red paper lantern hanging from the building eaves
elevated wooden plank pathway running alongside the hot spring pools

segments.scene_description: The character moves along wooden walkways that run alongside the hot spring pools, passing under traditional covered structures. Red paper lanterns hang from the buildings, glowing warmly against the evening light. The path continues over the water on elevated platforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: stepping stone path across hot spring pool with main building view

events.description: character steps from wooden walkway onto large stepping stones in the hot spring water
character turns to face the main traditional building and slowly looks around the area

agents.ego_description: hopping across stepping stones in the hot spring pool and observing the main traditional building architecture

entered.detail: large flat rocks submerged in the hot spring water forming a path across the pool
large traditional wooden building with ornate curved roof and glowing windows
waterfall cascading down rocks in the background behind the springs

segments.scene_description: The character navigates across large stepping stones submerged in the hot spring water, approaching an impressive traditional wooden building with ornate roof details. Steam continues to rise from the pools as the character turns to survey the area, revealing a distant waterfall and more bamboo groves surrounding the springs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded depths of a bamboo forest into the expansive, steaming vistas of the Hiyoshi Springs. It begins along a winding dirt path where long shadows stretch across the ground, moving past a traditional wooden fence toward the entrance of the springs. As the forest opens up, the camera follows the character across wooden bridges over milky, steaming pools and rocky cliffs, while the lighting shifts to a glowing orange sunset filtering through the mist. The scene then transitions along elevated wooden walkways and under covered structures adorned with glowing red paper lanterns before leading the character across submerged stepping stones. Finally, the camera approaches an ornate wooden building, turning to reveal a distant waterfall and surrounding bamboo groves enveloped in rising steam.
